title: Attribute Swap Indicator
description: Configurable HUD mod that displays the success (and failures) of your attribute swaps. Targeted towards PVP practice.
body:
# **Attribute Swap Indicator**

This mod adds a **singular HUD element** to display your (usually un/)successful attribute swaps during normal gameplay. Available settings control the 'lifetime' of swaps to display, how long inputs last to be considered a part of a swap, the limit of swaps to see and HUD element positioning as well as scale.

Frustrated at having no feedback whatsoever on if you've performed a successful sword to mace swap? With Attribute Swap Indicator, a HUD element will display and log (by default, 2 separate swaps or 3 sequential swaps) your attribute swap results right under your crosshair, allowing you to have a better understanding of your performance in MacePVP fights.



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/j6GIjoeJQ0U" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(Additional previews are present within the gallery, for similar pvp QOL mods, do check out [Tektonikal](https://modrinth.com/user/Tektonikal)) 

## Dependencies

The mod requires [Fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), and [Cloth config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) + [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) for configuration.



### 26.2 and the future

26.2 officially patched attribute swapping, however, this mod is still useful if:
- You still want to practice spear -> anything (spear reach swapping still works!) 
- You play on servers that are older than 26.2
- You play on servers with plugins that add attribute swapping
